Hey, this is Russell Brunson, and I want to show you behind the scenes of a really successful automated webinar funnel.
Actually this funnel began as just a webinar funnel, and since then we kind of migrated into an automated webinar funnel.
Both of these you can build really easily inside of ClickFunnels.
I want to show you just kind of the psychology behind a lot of what I did and why and things like that.
So the first thing is that I did put the logo at the top.
Some people always ask me why I have a logo there.
And part of me is because for me this is more of a branding play as well, not just you know straight sale thing.
So you don't have to have that on top, but that's the reason why I did it.
And then I wanted to find a really cool image which is different, okay?
For me marketing is all about pattern interrupts.
How do I change their perspective when they come to this page and they see this weird thing that I haven't seen anywhere else?
So I use this picture that came from one of our videos, and then I tried to figure out a really good hook for this webinar.
And so you know the people that show up for webinars based on curiosity, like that's kind of it.
So they have to give them something they can't figure out just by just on their own.
So I really focused a lot of times on this headline and it turned out really, really good.
It's been amazing for us.
So it's my weird niche funnel that's currently making me $17,947 per day and how to ethically knock it off in just 10 minutes or less.
And I have my reserve of their seat thing that can reserve their seat.
So that's kind of the first page here.
Then I also have obviously the date and the time.
I have some urgency, scarcity.
I also added in some of the things that are going to learn on this webinar, which these are the three secrets that they're going to learn on the webinar.
And if you've ever gone through my webinar training, you know, that's what I kind of teach is you need one kind of headline for it, which there's my headline and three proven secrets.
And that's kind of how you structure the whole content of your training.
But I also put those things right here on the actual landing page.
And I have this big huge bonus for them showing up right here, which is we're going to give them a done for you funnel.
And then I have again the call to action again here as well.
So that's kind of the registration page that we drive all the traffic to both from email and from Facebook and from all the different avenues as many as we can.
Okay.
So that's kind of how we structured the registration page.
Now if you're doing this live, click funnels integrates with either go either go to webinar, which we did for this campaign, or you can also do with webinar jam.
If you're doing as an automated webinar, you can just upload your videos and click funnels and it'll work from there.
So for that, we just did.
If there's an automated webinar version, you'd pick the date and the time on this pop-up as well.
So that's kind of how that works.
And that's kind of how we do the first page of the funnel.
Again, the biggest things here are pattern interrupt, really compelling headline, curiosity based headline.
They can't just figure it out on their own.
And those are the, I think those are the two core things that really get things to happen.
Now the next page is after they opted, and then we take them to a page like this.
And I added this link here later because a lot of people were saying that, you know, they registered through here and go to webinar automatically subscribed them and they may not have got the email.
So add this button back here where they can just click on this and go back to go to webinar again if they wanted to.
And then I had this thing that says, here's your vent ticket.
And again, I've done different ways like this in the past.
Some of these, you know, look a little bit different, but this one worked really, really good because we made a lot of money on the live webinar, but we also made a lot of money before the webinar ever started.
So what I did is I just had, you know, here's the event ticket for this webinar.
I have video kind of telling them, here's what to expect and follow these steps.
So they said step one, write down the dates and times of your event.
Step two, get your free ClickPhone account here.
And step three, show up live because this is a special bonus I'm going to give you.
And then we had a countdown clock.
And this little concept is sort of like homework step.
It's something we used to do back in the days, back when I was doing tele-seminars.
And I haven't seen people do these for years, but we added this to our thank you page.
And like I said, we had people who made, affiliates who made over $3,500 before the webinar even started by registering down here.
So there's a lot of, you know, a lot of reasons why you can do this right here.
It doesn't have to be a continuity program.
A lot of times we've seen people who just take like a $37 or a $97 version of their product and say, hey, go buy this so you're prepared for the webinar.
But there's a lot of free money that can happen just by having that on the thank you page.
And down here we just had kind of a recap of what they're getting and things like that.
Okay.
So that was the registration page.
Now inside of ClickFunnels, one cool thing you can do is we have this option called an instant opt-in where when somebody is sending out an email broadcast, you can talk to them.
And again, you do an email broadcast to your own list or email broadcasts when you're buying solo ads and things like that or an affiliate list where they can literally, they have a special URL.
Again, if you're inside of ClickFunnels, you can go and click on instant opt-in.
In fact, I'll show you real quick.
Let me pause this and go into ClickFunnels.
Okay.
So here inside of ClickFunnels, there's a little button here that says instant opt-in.
If you click on that, you pick the email service provider that the person is using.
So if they're using Aweber, you click on that.
And then this is the link you have someone click on to register.
What will happen is this little email, this is what Aweber, it'll pull that person's email address into the email and they click on that.
It'll automatically subscribe them to the webinar.
So it bypasses this page, it automatically subscribes them and drops them onto this page, which we started doing for our campaign.
It had just amazing success.
And so using instant opt-in is awesome.
Again, depending on what autoresponder you're using, if you're using Fusionsoft, that's what it needs to look like.
The link, if you're using something different, you just kind of do it for whatever autoresponder you're using.
And that's the link that they click on inside the email.
It'll auto-subscribe them to your webinar and then take them to step number two in the funnel.
So that's kind of a little trick that we learned that had huge dramatic impacts on how much money we made from the webinar.
Now, most of those webinar funnels, that's it.
There's registration page, the thank you page, and people go on the webinar and that's kind of it.
I want to show you again behind the scenes of what we're doing that works really, really well and hopefully give you guys some ideas as you're mapping out your webinar funnels.
So actually gone through this, then we start sending an email sequence leading up to the webinar.
And so what we did is we looked at the really successful product launch funnels and most of them have three videos leading to this big offer reveal.
So we thought let's do the same thing, but let's do that here inside of the webinar funnel.
So they register for the webinar and then that same day they get video number one in our product launch sequence, which is me, for this example, it's me and Mandy and she's going through and she's competing with Chris here in the Octagon to make a funnel and then I go to the office and actually build out this entire funnel, which is where that picture came from.
Okay, so that's kind of what I did here and then again I'm going to call the actual thing and get their free click funnels account.
And I had the recap of when the webinar is starting, all those kind of things down here as well.
And then I have video number two coming.
So then the next day they get email with video number two, which is how to design your funnel.
I show them this video, it's really fun of Mandy and Chris here in the Octagon.
Let me see if I can...
So I show them in the Octagon, then actually go to the whiteboard and I map out her funnel with her.
And it's not going to scroll with me, but I map out her funnel with her here and then we go back to the Octagon to actually build it out and then again I give them a call to action to their...
Create their thing.
And then video number three they get...
Sometimes this video comes before the webinar, sometimes it comes after.
It doesn't really matter, but here's video four now where we go through and she finishes her funnel out and then I go and click funnels and I do a whole demo.
So they have a chance before the webinar or maybe right after the webinar to be resold on click funnels and then there's another call to action and everything else is in there.
So that's kind of the concept you guys that has made our webinar funnel so successful is not only are we doing the registration thank you page, we also have this warm up sequence, this indoctrination sequence that goes out to them after they've registered to get them more likely to purchase our product when they get on the webinar or to sign up for our homework step.
And then after the webinar is over then we push them to a replay funnel where they can go and they can watch a replay of the event as well.
And this page obviously makes us a lot of money as well.
So that's kind of the current process we use for our webinar and our automated webinar funnels and hope that gives you guys some ideas on how to model a very successful funnel.
